reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use Material2dBundle with a full screen shadow mask texture atlas that swaps between safe and beam hit states without reallocating GPU resources.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_shadow_safezone_overlay_1920x1080.png through AssetServer and bind atlas frame indices to the light system state resource.
runtime_notes: Frame 0 represents calm safe shadow tint and frame 1 represents active exposure contact tint.
Overlay renders above world props and below UI widgets so gameplay shapes remain readable.
Color alpha is applied in shader space and must remain deterministic across 60 FPS updates.

context.usage: Displays safe shadow zones and exposure wash when beam contact changes the survival state.

shape.silhouette: Full screen translucent mask with narrow beam edges, pooled safe shadow fills, and sharp occluder cuts around platforms and mirrors.

specs.texture: Soft grain inside the teal shadow fill and clean exposure strips inside the beam wash.
specs.shading: Teal safe zones use 40 percent alpha and exposure wash uses 55 percent alpha with hard cut boundaries.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 3840x1080 px with two 1920x1080 frames.
Safe shadow frame uses #1A4A52 as the dominant tint and exposure frame uses #F5EFE0 plus #D4682A along beam contact edges.
Every occluder boundary lands on whole pixel coordinates so the beam mask does not shimmer during camera pan.
